_defaults.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
_defaults.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Shree Shree Govindajee Temple
temples.description: A historic Vaishnavite temple adjoining the former royal palace area of Manipur.

temples.name: Vishnu Temple, Bishnupur
temples.description: A 15th-century Vishnu temple built during the reign of King Kiyamba.

temples.name: Shri Bijoy Govindajee Temple
temples.description: A Vaishnavite temple included in Manipur's spiritual circuit development references.

temples.name: Kaina Temple
temples.description: A sacred Vaishnavite site at Kaina, listed in Manipur's spiritual circuit references.

temples.name: Sanamahi Temple
temples.description: A temple dedicated to Lord Sanamahi, an important deity in the indigenous Meitei religious tradition.
